response.overview: Anish, a young college student, becomes somewhat estranged from his family after  studying abroad and falling into a hidden addiction to weed. Returning to his home  country, the aspiring chef's journey takes a troubling turn when he is fired from his  inaugural internship with a renowned chef. Burdened by fear of judgment, he struggles to  confide in his parents. However, as he confronts his denial about his addiction and  navigates the consequences of his actions, an unexpected transformation unfolds,  ultimately fostering a reconnection with his family.
response.tagline: A young aspiring chef becomes distant to his family ever since he went to study abroad.  Coming back home, he makes a lot of reckless decisions which unexpectedly bring him  closer to his family.
response.title: malai kofta
